title: Renovations for the new Masjid
customText:
Alhumdullillah we hit our target and secured the new masjid!
Allahu Akbar! By Allahs ultimate mercy and then your incredible generosity, trust, and duas, we have reached our $1.6 million target and secured the building, Alhamdulillah! 

Phase 2: We are now launching Phase 2: A Renovation Fund. Every dollar raised  will go directly toward renovating and beautifying our new masjid, ensuring the space is completely ready for worship when our community walks through the doors, InshaAllah.
